# ModuleSnapshot constructor

Immutable snapshot of all module-package items currently held by the player. Produced by `IInventoryProbe.TryReadModules` at the 1Hz refresh tick and surfaced via [`GetModules`](../../Stellar.Abstractions.Services/IInventory/GetModules.md).

public ModuleSnapshot(IReadOnlyList<ModuleInfo> Modules, long ServerSampledAtTicks)
